description: Fix new ToolError('Request was aborted', 'aborted') with no category in sentry-api.ts.
qualityChecks: cd plugins/sentry && npm run build && npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run format:check

userStories.title: Replace new ToolError('aborted') with ToolError.timeout() in sentry-api.ts
userStories.description: In plugins/sentry/src/sentry-api.ts, the catch block at lines 175-176 throws `new ToolError('Request was aborted', 'aborted')` with no category set at all. Replace with ToolError.timeout() so the category is properly set for agent error handling.
acceptanceCriteria: The `new ToolError('Request was aborted', 'aborted')` at line 176 is replaced with ToolError.timeout('Request was aborted') in sentry-api.ts
